raw_text:
ERROR   [TC-E-004] interface.f90:6 <-> header.h:3  struct outer_t
  NESTED_NON_BIND: Field 'inner' is of type 'inner_t' which lacks BIND(C).
  A BIND(C) derived type must have all components of interoperable type.
  Fortran 2003 §15.3.4 C1505: violation. Struct layout is undefined.

NOTE: Add BIND(C) to 'inner_t' and ensure all its fields are interoperable.
